summary: C4 complete: Created ChessPieces.ts with pure SDF/polygon hit-test functions for all 6 pieces (pawn: circle union, rook: rectangles+crenellations, bishop: trapezoid+triangle+mitre, knight: 21-vertex polygon winding-number, queen: trapezoid+5 polar crown points, king: trapezoid+cross). Extended ShapeType to include chess types, added ray-march boundary sampling for distortion/LUT. 14 new tests, 140 total passing.
